key_insight: ILLUME+ is a scalable explainability framework for cancer drug response prediction that goes beyond single-gene rankings to reveal more stable and biologically meaningful patterns of gene activity.
clinical_relevance: By improving how transcriptomic models generate interpretable insights, this work may support better biomarker discovery and hypothesis generation in precision oncology.
method: Post-hoc explainability framework integrated into an end-to-end drug response prediction pipeline
Produces multiple complementary explanation types instead of only univariate gene importance scores
Designed to be scalable and more stable than prior explainability baselines
evidence_signal: According to the abstract, ILLUME+ showed more stable gene importance scores, recovered known drug-gene associations and mechanisms of action, and supported discovery of novel interaction-driven signals.
watch_item: The approach remains post-hoc and explainability outputs still need careful biological validation before being treated as actionable findings.
paper_title: Explainable AI for Cancer Drug Response Prediction: Beyond Univariate Feature Attributions
